message:
fix(agent-drivers): replace insecure Math.random() with crypto.getRandomValues()

Replace all Math.random() usage in agent drivers with cryptographically
secure alternatives using crypto.getRandomValues(). Add shared
generateSecureId() helper to base-driver.ts for consistent secure ID
generation across all driver implementations.

Fixes:
- claude-driver.ts: messageId and checkpointId generation
- acp-driver.ts: messageId and checkpointId generation
- tmux-driver.ts: messageId generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
